response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong 20 years of software engineering experience and entrepreneurial initiative, the role specifically requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows only recent AI-agent infrastructure work without evidence of strategic AI/ML products, deep machine learning expertise, or the specialized AI knowledge expected for a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
strengths: 20 years of comprehensive software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure—exceeds the 15-year requirement with Staff-level roles
Proven entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and multiple impactful open-source projects demonstrating initiative and product-building capability
Strong technical breadth and cloud expertise including AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and Docker with demonstrated DevOps and infrastructure knowledge
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or products built with AI despite the role being AI Strategy-focused—only recent peripheral AI-agent infrastructure work mentioned
Limited evidence of Director-level strategic vision, thought leadership, or industry recognition specifically in AI, which is critical for advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption
No Master's or PhD in AI/ML/CS-related fields; background is more full-stack engineering than specialized AI research or strategic AI platform development

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products
20 years of software engineering experience at Staff level
